specific_location: Across street (north) of Teller Farms parking lot
description: Zonotrichia sparrow in flock with WCSP and Harris's. Larger than WCSP, smaller than Harris's. Head only part seen well. Thick black lateral crown stripes meeting over bill (on forehead). Central crown, behind where black crosses over, bright yellow in front fading to gray posteriorly. Face plain gray. Bill mostly dusky/silveryBehaviors: Hiding in bushes with 20+ WC Sparrows and 2 Harris's SparrowsCall: not heardPlumage: adult
